name: Web Ingest
description: Fetch a public website, convert its useful HTML into clean Markdown, and emit metadata-rich JSONL chunks for RAG workflows. Supports an optional Playwright render path for JavaScript-heavy pages.

tools.name: status
tools.description: Check engine readiness and whether the optional Playwright renderer is installed.

tools.name: ingest_website
tools.description: Fetch one public webpage, convert it to Markdown, and save page.md, chunks.jsonl, and metadata.json. Start with render=false; retry with render=true only when the static response lacks the page content.

url.description: Absolute public http:// or https:// webpage URL.

render.description: Use Playwright/Chromium for JavaScript-rendered pages. Default false.

chunk_chars.description: Target maximum characters per RAG chunk. Default 4000.

max_bytes.description: Maximum HTML response size. Default 5000000, max 25000000.

wait_ms.description: Extra wait after Playwright network-idle, in milliseconds. Default 0.

save_html.description: Also persist the fetched source HTML for debugging. Default false.
